name: Tank Battle Royale
short_description: Video game about tank battles. Fight against opponents in multiplayer or in career mode. Earn points and upgrade your tank. Unlock new levels to complete together in cooperative mode.
detailed_description:
Armor. Chaos. Total Destruction.

Dive into high‑octane tank combat where every wall is just a temporary inconvenience. Everything you see on the map can be reduced to rubble. No artificial barriers—only you, your rivals, and a battlefield that disappears under treads and heavy fire.

Why You’ll Love It

  • Online PvP With Friends: Squad up or face off in intense, fast‑paced tank battles.

  • Power‑Ups & Progression: Grab airborne drops or earn rewards mid‑match to boost armor, firepower, reload speed, mobility, and restore HP.

  • Level Up & Unlock: Score big, unlock new stages, upgrade your tank, and carve your legend into the battlefield.

  • Fully Destructible Environments: Blast through buildings, defenses, and anything in your way—create your own attack paths.

Game Modes

🛑 Survival

Navigate a mine‑strewn battlefield packed with unique challenges and special rewards. Complete objectives, dodge traps, earn points—every move is a risk that could pay off huge… or end in a spectacular explosion.

🤝 Co‑Op

Team up against AI forces. Capture and hold territory, build walls and traps, coordinate maneuvers. In this mode, teamwork is everything—and the map rewards squads that think ahead.

🔥 Classic Multiplayer: Free‑For‑All

No rules. No mercy. Rack up points by destroying anyone who crosses your sightline. Play online with friends—today’s ally can be tomorrow’s target.

A Living, Hazard‑Filled Battlefield

  • Missile turrets.

  • Explosive walls.

  • Hidden surprises you’ll only discover in combat.

Every map tests your reflexes, strategy, and nerve.

Airdrops Change Everything

Watch the skies: when a cargo plane appears, it’s carrying rare loot. Reach the drop before your enemies to secure strategic upgrades—reinforcements, repairs, limited‑time boosts, and more.

Ready?

Fire up the engine, rally your crew, level the map, and prove whose tank rules the warzone. Your tactics. Your tracks. Your victory.
